# hetzner_failovers (Data Source)

Lists all Hetzner failover IPs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_failovers" "all" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `failovers` (Attributes List) List of failover IPs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--failovers))

<a id="nestedatt--failovers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `failovers`

Read-Only:

- `active_server_ip` (String) The server IP the failover is currently routed to.
- `ip` (String) The failover IP address.
- `netmask` (String) The failover netmask.
- `server_ip` (String) The owner server main IP.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) The owner server IPv6 network.
- `server_number` (Number) The owner server number.
